svg.title: Floyd-Warshall on 4-node weighted graph
svg.desc: Step-by-step all-pairs shortest path computation showing distance matrix updates for each intermediate vertex k
svg.text: Floyd-Warshall — edges: A→B=3, A→C=8, B→C=2, C→D=5, B→D=7
k = A (intermediate vertex A) · check if going through A shortens any path
After k=A (no changes — all paths through A come from ∞)
k = B · check: dist[i][B] + dist[B][j] < dist[i][j] for all i,j
k=B: A→C relaxed 8→5 · A→D relaxed ∞→10 · Continue with k=C then k=D
